product_description: PebbleGo is a digital learning platform designed for K-5 students, offering nonfiction articles, eBooks, and teaching resources to support literacy skills and build knowledge in subjects like science and social studies. It features read-aloud audio, rich vocabulary support, and multimodal learning tools.

vendor_resources.justification: This page, hosted by Capstone, details accessibility features, commitment to WCAG 2.2 AA, Section 508, and EN 301 549, and mentions available VPATs.
